---
name: 🚀 Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for MEDINOVA 
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: 'enhancement, needs-review'
'
---

## 🚀 Feature Summary
A clear and concise description of the feature you're proposing.

---

## 📍 Related Module
Which part of the application does this feature relate to? (check all that apply)

- [ ] 🤖 AI Symptom Detection / Chatbot (Dialogflow)
- [ ] 📍 Appointment Scheduling / Google Maps
- [ ] 🔗 Blockchain Medical Records
- [ ] 🫁 X-Ray Lung Diagnosis
- [ ] 🪪 Card ID Verification (Nanonets OCR)
- [ ] 🤳 Face ID Authentication
- [ ] 🔐 Login / OAuth
- [ ] 🛒 Paramedical E-Shop
- [ ] 📰 Blogs / Web Scraping Search
- [ ] 💳 Payments (Stripe)
- [ ] 🎙️ Voice Assistant (ALAN SDK)
- [ ] 🧠 Mental Health Test
- [ ] 🆕 Entirely new module
- [ ] Other (describe below)

---

## 💡 Problem / Motivation
What problem does this feature solve? Is it related to an existing frustration?

> e.g. "As a patient, I find it hard to [...] because [...]"

---

## 🛠️ Proposed Solution
Describe the solution you'd like to see. Be as specific as possible.

---

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered
Have you considered any alternative solutions or workarounds? Why did you rule them out?

---

## 🗺️ Relation to v3 Roadmap
Does this feature align with any planned v3 improvements? (check if applicable)

- [ ] 🎨 UI/UX redesign
- [ ] ⚡ FastAPI migration
- [ ] 🤖 LLM integration
- [ ] 🧪 CI/CD pipeline
- [ ] 📦 Dependency updates
- [ ] 🏗️ Scalable architecture
- [ ] ❌ Not related to v3 — new proposal

---

## 📸 Mockups / Examples
If applicable, add mockups, sketches, or links to similar features in other products.

---

## 📋 Acceptance Criteria
How do we know when this feature is complete? List the conditions that must be met.

- [ ] ...
- [ ] ...
- [ ] ...

---

## ⚙️ Technical Considerations
Any thoughts on implementation? Relevant libraries, APIs, or architectural concerns to keep in mind.

> e.g. "This could use the existing Dialogflow webhook to extend symptom detection with [...]"

---

## 💡 Additional Context
Any other context, screenshots, or references that support this request.
